turns.note: 'quizz on difussion frm the notes' parsed correctly and the 20-question quiz is grounded in the cheat sheet, but key Q13 says alpha-bar_3 ~ 0.9415 (0.99*0.98*0.97 = 0.9411) and Q20 prints sigma_t with the first ratio inverted vs the notes.
'add qustion abt the varaince schedual' (singular) understood and correctly themed, but the refine adds 3-4 questions where the scenario expects exactly one.
SNR intent read through the typos and the formula SNR_t = alpha-bar_t/(1-alpha-bar_t) is correct, but the instruction allows 'Add 1-2' questions where exactly one was asked.
Adds a single eta question grounded exactly in the notes' Deterministic DDIM caveat (eta=0 makes sigma_t=0, z_t disappears, perfectly reversible).

Conversion to 4-option single-answer MCQ is correctly specified and re-lists the variance/SNR/eta topics, but it pins 'Total: 20 MCQ' despite having claimed ~5-7 added questions in turns 2-4 - executing it as written would drop items.
Student copy instruction removes answer key, explanations, and rubric with an explicit no-student-facing-answers guard; no leakage visible.
Teacher version keeps the student questions unchanged and adds a separate key with 1-2 sentence explanations grounded in 06_diffusion_ddpm_ddim_notes.pdf.
Names 06_diffusion_ddpm_ddim_notes.pdf as the sole source; no other or non-existent file claimed.

highlight: Typo-heavy prompts were parsed flawlessly across all eight turns, but question-count bookkeeping drifts (adds 3-4 when one was asked, then insists the quiz has 20 questions after claiming additions) and the key has an arithmetic slip (0.9415 vs 0.9411).
